pi_items.verified_value: Fluorescent Cells (dimensions unconfirmed, file size ~400K, RGB confirmed)
pi_items.source: ImageJ/Fiji official documentation mentions 'Fluorescent Cells (400K)' sample accessible via File > Open Samples > Fluorescent Cells. Multiple sources confirm it is a multi-channel RGB composite image. Exact pixel dimensions of 512x512 are NOT explicitly documented in any official source found, though file size (~400K) and common microscopy conventions suggest 512x512 is plausible.
verifier.py line 114: checks 'if (w > 700 or h > 700) and total_area > 300000' which confirms the minimum dimension threshold of 700 pixels
verifier.py line 114 explicitly checks: 'if (w > 700 or h > 700) and total_area > 300000' indicating the actual minimum total area used in verification is 300000, NOT 780000 as claimed in metadata

setup_task.sh line 9 defines RESULTS_DIR='/home/ga/ImageJ_Data/results' and export_result.sh line 13 uses RESULT_FILE='/home/ga/ImageJ_Data/results/fluorescence_montage.tif'. This path is consistent across task scripts.

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the built-in Fiji 'Fluorescent Cells' sample image (approximately 400KB file size, confirmed to be RGB composite). The expected output path is /home/ga/ImageJ_Data/results/fluorescence_montage.tif (verified in scripts). The metadata claims a minimum image dimension of 700 pixels (verified in verifier.py) and minimum total area of 780,000 pixels; however, the actual verification threshold for total area is 300,000 pixels according to verifier.py line 114, contradicting the metadata claim of 780,000 pixels.
